description: A customer can place multiple sales orders.
business_rule: Every sales order must belong to one customer.

description: Each sales order contains one product.
business_rule: Every sales order must reference one product.

description: Each sales order is handled by one sales representative.
business_rule: Every sales order must have one responsible sales representative.

description: Each sales order occurs on one business date.
business_rule: Every sales order must have one order date.
